prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3881名、2546名、2083名、1704名、1732名。2021至2024年呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），2025年较2024年略有后移约28名，近两年基本稳定在1700名附近，2025年基准位次约1732名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年40人、2022年20人、2023年7人、2024年7人、2025年7人；2026年计划仍为7人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招变化，招生计划对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第12名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–16名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类舆情，未见明显负面冲击；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（考生反映投档线暴跌），但2025年位次已回稳，滞后影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，哈尔滨工业大学拥有17个A-及以上学科，其中力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、土木工程等为A，工科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热（2024–2026年均为推荐/高热推荐），与哈工大优势学科高度匹配；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省（非本省），在北京招生计划较少（7人），属于跨省招生；北京考生对哈工大作为国防七子之首的认可度较高，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历年位次近两年稳定在1700名附近（2025年基准1732名）；2026年招生计划与2025年持平，无供需弹性调整；但北京市2026年考生总数较2025年大幅增长约29.7%，竞争加剧将推高位次数字（录取门槛后移）；哈工大作为顶尖工科985、抖音高热、优势学科突出，对高分考生吸引力不减，部分抵消竞争加剧的影响。综合权衡，在2025年基准1732名基础上小幅后移约50名，预测2026年最低录取位次约1732名，波动区间1579–1985名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 哈尔滨工业大学2026年在京综合类仅招7人，均为工科试验班/人工智能等顶尖培养项目，专业间分差极小。位次在预测区间（1579–1985名）内建议以二档为主攻方向、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1579名）可重点冲刺未来技术拔尖班或院士特色班等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>1985名）需谨慎报考，建议搭配其他院校保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 3881, 2546, 2083, 1704, and 1732 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). In 2025, there was a slight backward shift of about 28 places compared to 2024, and in the past two years, it has basically stabilized around 1700. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1732. The enrollment plan for this university in Beijing's comprehensive category: 40 students in 2021, 20 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 7 in 2025. The plan for 2026 remains 7 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, and the enrollment plan has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 12th (Top 20), and in recent years, its ranking has been stable in the 11th to 16th range, making it a top domestic engineering university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management public opinion, with no obvious negative impact. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (candidates reported a sharp drop in the cutoff line), but the ranking has stabilized in 2025, with limited lagging effects. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Harbin Institute of Technology has 17 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Civil Engineering. Its engineering strength is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity (recommended/highly recommended from 2024 to 2026), which highly matches HIT's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Beijing is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate numbers and intensified competition. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province (not the home province), with a small enrollment plan in Beijing (7 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Beijing candidates have a high recognition of HIT as the top of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense,' and the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: historical rankings have stabilized around 1700 in the past two years (baseline 1732 in 2025); the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, with no supply-demand elasticity adjustment. However, the total number of candidates in Beijing in 2026 has increased significantly by about 29.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition and pushing up ranking numbers (admission threshold moving backward). As a top engineering 985 university with high Douyin heat and outstanding advantageous disciplines, HIT remains attractive to high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the impact of intensified competition. Balancing these factors, based on the 2025 baseline of 1732, a slight backward shift of about 50 places is expected, predicting the minimum admission ranking for 2026 to be approximately 1732, with a fluctuation range of 1579 to 1985.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Harbin Institute of Technology only enrolls 7 students in Beijing's comprehensive category in 2026, all in top training programs such as Engineering Experimental Classes/Artificial Intelligence, with minimal score differences between majors. For rankings within the predicted range (1579–1985), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<1579), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as the Future Technology Top Class or Academician Special Class. For rankings near the upper limit (>1985), apply cautiously and consider other universities as safety options.
